title: 🧠 200IQ UI (In-game wiki)
description: Adds a bunch of useful information to Gui like crafting tables, smithing table, and more!
body:
Ever forget what ingredients make a potion? Ever forget how to craft a specific item? Ever forget how many blocks are needed for a beacon?

Well, look no further than 200IQ UI solves all of these problems and more by adding custom info panels for quick reference! Never get caught googling for simple game information again. Check out the image gallery and see for yourself!

## Features
- Adds custom overlay info panels for the brewing stand gui that shows potion modifiers and ingredients for a quick reference.
- Adds custom overlay info panels and graphic for the smithing table that shows color trimming combinations, where to obtain each smithing template, and the corresponding block that is used to craft more templates.
- Adds custom overlay info panels for the furnace gui that shows fuel consumption per x items for quick reference.
- Adds custom overlay info panel for cartography table, showing which items can be used to lock/duplicate/zoom out map.
- Replaces the beacon gui - shows the amount of blocks to complete the beacon and blocks per layer.
- Replaces the brewing stand gui with a (somewhat) nice looking skin.
- Adds guis to ALL(13) villager types + wandering trader that displays a full catalog of possible trades.
- Modifies the villager trade screen to show villager xp symbols.
